visual_description: A man in a dark suit and tie stands in front of a wall covered with pinned maps and documents, holding a clipboard and looking toward the right side of the frame. The scene shifts to a dimly lit, narrow alleyway with tiled walls and a hanging red decorative item. A person in a light-colored shirt is partially visible on the left edge of the frame, walking past the man.
audio_description: The audio clip opens with a burst of energetic, high-tempo electronic music, immediately immersing the listener in a vibrant, action-oriented atmosphere. The music is characterized by a fast, driving four-on-the-floor beat, a punchy synthesized kick drum, sharp snare/clap accents, and a syncopated, high-pitched melodic lead that evokes the style of Japanese video game soundtracks from the late 1980s to early 1990s. The arrangement is dense and layered, with a bright, slightly tinny timbre and a compressed, modern mix that maintains consistent loudness and clarity. The music is presented in stereo, with the melodic lead panned to the right and the rhythmic elements centered, creating a sense of spatial width and. At the three-second mark, a male voice enters, speaking Mandarin Chinese in a clear, neutral, and professional tone. The voice is dry and closely miked, with no reverb or environmental noise, and is mixed slightly lower than the music but remains prominent and intelligible.
